Scene: Horizontal strip of 4 small panels showing each kid's first reaction to a cute white cube robot: 1) Indian girl with wide fascinated eyes 2) Mexican-American boy analyzing with tablet 3) Nigerian-British girl photographing with camera 4) Japanese-Korean boy poking it with red gloves, character introduction sequence. Blip is a small cute white cube robot approximately 4 inches on each side, made of matte white plastic-like casing with slightly rounded edges and some scuff marks from being handled, with a glowing LED screen on its front face that displays simple emoji-style expressions in cyan teal color showing two round dot eyes and a curved smile line, a small flexible antenna on top that wiggles when it communicates, tiny hover thrusters on the bottom that keep it floating about 2 feet off the ground with a soft hum, a slight dirt smudge from being found in a basement, and a friendly childlike curious personality that shows through its ever-changing facial expressions. Leo is a 11-year-old Mexican-American boy coder with warm tan golden-brown skin, a compact stocky build with broad shoulders, black thick slightly grown-out fade haircut under a navy blue beanie with a small pixelated heart patch sewn on the side, very dark intense eyes with thick eyebrows, a serious focused expression, oversized gray hoodie with sleeves pulled over his hands and a tablet tucked in the front pocket, a dark t-shirt underneath, jeans with grass-stained knees at the grass stains from kneeling while working, sturdy double-knotted sneakers, and reading glasses hanging from a chain around his neck. Maya is a 11-year-old Indian girl inventor with warm brown skin, dark brown messy ponytail with escaped strands and a pencil stuck in it, safety goggles pushed up on her forehead, oversized olive green utility vest with many pockets full of wires and tools, a faded red rocket ship t-shirt underneath, cargo shorts, velcro sneakers with one untied lace, a modified digital watch with tiny antenna on her left wrist, a gap-toothed grin, lean wiry build, and a curious determined expression with wide dark brown eyes that sparkle when she discovers something new. Sam is a 10-year-old Japanese-Korean boy gamer with light-medium warm skin, a compact athletic muscular build as the shortest in the group, black spiky messy hair styled with gel on top and shaved close on the sides, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a mischievous sparkle always looking for fun, a round face with a pointed chin, a missing bottom front baby tooth giving him an impish grin, bright red fingerless gaming gloves that go up to his wrists, a black t-shirt with PLAYER 1 printed on it, athletic shorts with side stripes, high-top sneakers with LED lights that flash in the soles, a gaming headset resting around his neck, knee pads with cartoon stickers on them, and boundless energy in every pose. Zara is an 12-year-old Nigerian-British girl artist with rich dark brown skin, a tall long-limbed graceful build, voluminous black natural hair in chunky twists with colorful thread woven through them, bright expressive dark brown eyes, high cheekbones, a wide warm smile with a gap in her front teeth, small 3D-printed stud earrings, a bright yellow crossbody bag covered in enamel pins and badges, an oversized denim jacket with patches and hand-drawn doodles on the sleeves, a colorful graphic art tee underneath, patterned leggings in bright colors, galaxy-painted sneakers, beaded bracelets on both wrists, and a stylus tucked behind her ear. Blip floats at eye level with the kids, its cyan LED screen changing expressions rapidly as it processes what is happening. Leo studies the data on his screen with narrowed eyes, his beanie slightly askew from running his hand through his hair. Maya points excitedly at her discovery, her gap-toothed grin spreading across her face as she explains what she found. Sam pumps his fist in triumph, full of youthful energy and enthusiasm that energizes the whole group. Zara observes everything with her trained eye, a warm smile on her face as she takes in the details others miss.
